primary.text: US 101 South / South Van Ness Avenue

maneuver.instruction: Turn right onto US 101 South/South Van Ness Avenue/Route 101.

steps.name: Central Freeway; Route 101

maneuver.instruction: Take the US 101 South ramp toward Oakland/San Jose.

steps.destinations: US 101 South, I 80 East: Oakland, San Jose

maneuver.instruction: Keep left to take I 80 East toward Bay Bridge/Oakland.

steps.name: MacArthur Freeway

maneuver.instruction: Keep right to take exit 8B onto I 580 East toward CA 24/Downtown Oakland/Hayward-Stockton.

steps.destinations: I 580 East, CA 24: Downtown Oakland, Hayward-Stockton

maneuver.instruction: Take exit 19C onto I 980 West toward I 880/Downtown Oakland.
Keep left to take I 980 West/John B. Williams Freeway toward 18th Street/14th Street.
